_meta.name: Parallel Branches
_meta.description: Two or more actions sharing the same runAfter parent, executing in parallel. A join point action runs after all branches complete.

placeholders.{{PARENT_ACTION}}: Name of the action that precedes the parallel split
placeholders.{{BRANCH_A_NAME}}: Name of first parallel branch action
placeholders.{{BRANCH_B_NAME}}: Name of second parallel branch action
placeholders.{{JOIN_ACTION}}: Name of the join point action (runs after both branches)

_notes.max_branches: Up to 20 parallel branches per split point.
_notes.join_pattern: The join action lists ALL branch names in its runAfter. It waits for all to complete.
_notes.partial_failure: If one branch fails, set join's runAfter to include ["Succeeded", "Failed"] to continue regardless.
_notes.no_shared_state: Parallel branches cannot share variables. Use Compose outputs and reference them in the join action.
